zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Wydeville於1425年7月31日出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓時，她的父親Sir Richard Woodville40歲，母親Joan Bedlisgate35歲。她於大約1426年與William Stacy在英國英格蘭肯特比登登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1470年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Wydeville于1425年7月31日出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓时，她的父亲Sir Richard Woodville40岁，母亲Joan Bedlisgate35岁。她于大约1426年与William Stacy在英国英格兰肯特比登登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1470年在英国英格兰史洛普爾享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Wydeville was born on 31 July 1425, in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard Woodville, was 40 and her mother, Joan Bedlisgate, was 35. She married William Stacy about 1426, in Biddenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1470, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Wydeville est née le 31 juillet 1425, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Woodville, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Joan Bedlisgate, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé William Stacy environ 1426, à Biddenden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1470, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Wydeville am 31. Juli 1425 in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Woodville 40 und ihre Mutter Joan Bedlisgate 35. Sie hat um 1426 in Biddenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom William Stacy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1470 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Wydevilleが1425年7月31日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Woodvilleは40歳，母Joan Bedlisgateは35歳であった。約1426年にイギリスイギリスケントビッドエンデンでWilliam Stacyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1470年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Wydeville(이)가 1425년 7월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Woodville(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Bedlisgate(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1426년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 비데든에서 William Stacy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Wydeville nasceu em 31 de julho de 1425, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Woodville, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Joan Bedlisgate, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com William Stacy aproximadamente 1426, em Biddenden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Wydeville родилась 31 июля 1425 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Woodville было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Bedlisgate, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Stacy около 1426 г. в местности бидденден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1470 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.
